title: Device Home Screen - Device image updates after changing earcups
scenario: Device Home Screen headset image does not update to reflect swapped earcups on Voyager Focus 2 UC
steps: 1. Pair a supported device with swappable earcups (e.g., Voyager Focus 2 UC) to the Poly Studio Mobile Android app.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and observe the device image displayed.
3. Remove the currently attached earcups from the headset.
4. Observe the device image on the Home screen.
5. Attach a different set of earcups to the headset.
6. Observe the device image on the Home screen immediately after attaching the new earcups.
expected: The device image on the Home screen should update to reflect the currently attached earcups immediately after the earcups are changed.
